subject: Pikipek — a small black and white woodpecker-type bird perched on a branch in a tropical setting
description: A small bird perches on a branch amid lush green tropical foliage. The bird has a predominantly black body with a white face and throat, and a distinctive red-topped head marking. It is depicted in a cheerful upright posture, looking slightly upward. The background is filled with green leaves and branches, creating a dense jungle or forest atmosphere. The overall palette is warm greens with the bird as the focal black-and-white-and-red element.
foreground: Small black and white bird with red head marking perched on a branch
background: Dense green tropical foliage and branches
